title: Clean Energy Incentive Program
details: DOE proposes incentives for state-level clean energy rebate programs, outlining eligibility requirements and reporting obligations.
abstract: Proposed incentives for state programs to accelerate residential clean energy adoption.
supplementary_information: Stakeholders are asked to comment on subsidy stacking concerns.

title: Autonomous Vehicle Safety Framework
details: DOT seeks comments on minimum safety requirements for Level 3+ autonomous vehicles, including telemetry disclosure and remote update policies.
abstract: Framework describing safety expectations for advanced driver assistance systems.
supplementary_information: DOT is especially interested in data retention standards.

title: Community Broadband Support Grants
details: FCC describes funding allocations for rural broadband build outs and outlines performance benchmarks.
abstract: Funding proposal for rural broadband providers.

title: AI Transparency in Newsroom Content
details: FCC proposes disclosure requirements when broadcasters and large publishers rely on AI-generated newswire material, focusing on provenance tagging and correction workflows.
abstract: Rule would require major outlets to track AI-assisted revisions and disclose automated sourcing when distributing public interest programming.
supplementary_information: Agencies seek comment on newsroom tooling burdens and impacts on computational journalism research.

title: Human-Centered Conversational AI Practices
details: NSF requests information on evaluation practices for socially aware language technologies, including participatory design workflows and multilingual benchmarking.
abstract: The RFI focuses on human-centered LLM collaboration, participatory prototyping, and equitable evaluation metrics for conversational agents.
supplementary_information: Feedback is requested from HCI and NLP researchers on ensuring inclusive design.

title: Administrative Data Standards for Algorithmic Accountability
details: OMB proposes guidance for agencies to publish program-level evaluation datasets that support replication of rulemaking cost-benefit models.
abstract: Guidance outlines metadata schemas, privacy checks, and protocols for sharing administrative data across agencies.
supplementary_information: Comments sought on how standards interact with AI impact assessments and ACUS recommendations.

title: Trustworthy Healthcare AI Validation Protocols
agency: Department of Health and Human Services
details: HHS seeks input on post-market surveillance metrics, dataset shift reporting, and privacy protections for clinical AI decision-support tools.
abstract: Proposal frames a reference validation protocol for hospitals deploying machine-learning diagnostics.
supplementary_information: Feedback requested on federated evaluation methods, neuroimaging datasets, and bias reporting templates.
